import { useState } from "react" import { Link } from "react-router-dom" const LoginPage =()=>{ const [logData,setLogData] = useState({ email:'', password:'' }) const handleSubmit = async()=>{ } const handleChange =(e)=>{ setLogData({...logData,[e.target.name]:e.target.value}) } return
